title: QuickMine - Mine Smarter, Not Harder!
description: Lightweight vein miner mod that lets you break entire ore veins with one click, saving time and effort in Minecraft.
body:
🪓 **QuickMine**

QuickMine is a lightweight and efficient vein miner mod designed to enhance your mining experience in Minecraft.
With QuickMine, you can break entire veins of ores or connected blocks in just one click, saving time and effort while exploring and gathering resources.

⚙️ **Key Features**

🧠 **Smart Mining**

Automatically detects and breaks connected blocks of the same type, allowing you to clear veins instantly.

🎯 **Energy Saving**

Only activates when the player holds down a custom key, giving you precise control over when QuickMine is used.

🛠️ **Durability Management**

Your tools lose durability proportional to the number of blocks mined, keeping gameplay balanced and fair.

⚡ **Fast and Intuitive**

QuickMine integrates seamlessly into Minecraft gameplay, providing a smooth and natural mining experience.

💎 **Why Use QuickMine?**

QuickMine is perfect for players who love mining but want it to be faster and less repetitive.
Whether you’re mining ores, clearing large areas, or gathering materials efficiently, QuickMine makes it quick, clean, and satisfying.
